mapper.select: select a.id as application_id, a.application_no, o.product_name, a.service_type, a.reason_text, t.customer_issue, r.tags as review_tags, r.comment as review_comment, r.rating, a.refund_amount, a.created_at from after_sale_application a left join demo_order o on a.order_id=o.id left join service_ticket t on a.ticket_id=t.id left join service_review r on a.id=r.application_id where a.created_at >= date_sub(now(), interval #{days} day) and o.product_name is not null order by a.created_at desc, a.id desc

select * from product_issue_alert
order by trend_score desc, issue_count desc, updated_at desc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into product_issue_alert( alert_no, product_name, issue_keyword, issue_count, application_count, ticket_count, low_rating_count, refund_amount, time_window_days, alert_level, trend_score, sample_application_ids, sample_reasons, suggested_action, status ) values( #{alertNo}, #{productName}, #{issueKeyword}, #{issueCount}, #{applicationCount}, #{ticketCount}, #{lowRatingCount}, #{refundAmount}, #{timeWindowDays}, #{alertLevel}, #{trendScore}, #{sampleApplicationIds}, #{sampleReasons}, #{suggestedAction}, #{status} )
mapper.update: update product_issue_alert set issue_count=#{issueCount}, application_count=#{applicationCount}, ticket_count=#{ticketCount}, low_rating_count=#{lowRatingCount}, refund_amount=#{refundAmount}, alert_level=#{alertLevel}, trend_score=#{trendScore}, sample_application_ids=#{sampleApplicationIds}, sample_reasons=#{sampleReasons}, suggested_action=#{suggestedAction}, status=#{status} where id=#{id}
